color.String(): Red
color.String(): Green
unknown.String(): ""
color.Marshal: "Blue"
color.Unmarshal(Green): 1
color.Unmarshal(Pink).err: q.GenEnumJSONStrict[Color]: unknown name "Pink"
status.Marshal: "done"
status.Unmarshal(pending): pending
status.Unmarshal(future_state): future_state
status.Remarshal: "future_state"
future_state valid? false
